steps.title: Write the proportion
steps.content:
The ratio $6$ to $x$ is equivalent to the ratio $y$ to $7$, so
$$\frac{6}{x}=\frac{y}{7}$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Cross-multiply and isolate $x$. The variable $x$ is in the denominator of the first ratio, so it becomes inversely related to $y$, not directly proportional to it.
$$6\cdot7=xy$$
$$42=xy$$
$$x=\frac{42}{y}$$
The answer is D.
